caption:
George Hincapie thinks Vanderpoel has the edge over Pogačar at Roubaix this Sunday 👀

The Paris-Roubaix legend breaks down why:
• Better team support - Alpecin's flat powerhouses vs UAE's climbers
• More cobble experience and bike handling mastery
• Philipsen as a secret weapon if he makes the finale

But here's what caught my attention: how much the equipment has changed the race. We've gone from 25mm tires at 140psi to 32mm tubeless at 55-65psi. Hincapie says you rarely see riders walking sections anymore.

The racing might look easier on TV, but it's actually harder than ever. When the best five riders in the world trickle in one by one, you know how brutal it was before that.

Full episode out now - link in bio 🎙️
